tasks.title: Define AgentContext and ToolRegistry
tasks.description: Create the AgentContext dataclass and ToolRegistry for managing tools.
tasks.details: Implement AgentContext as a dataclass with fields for account_id, phone, conversation_id, and thread_id. Create ToolRegistry to manage tool definitions and handlers.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to ensure AgentContext fields are correctly initialized and ToolRegistry can register and retrieve tools.

subtasks.title: Create AgentContext Dataclass
subtasks.description: Implement the AgentContext as a dataclass with specified fields.
subtasks.details: Define a dataclass named AgentContext with fields for account_id, phone, conversation_id, and thread_id.
subtasks.testStrategy: Write unit tests to ensure all fields are initialized correctly.

subtasks.title: Design ToolRegistry Class
subtasks.description: Create the ToolRegistry class to manage tool definitions and handlers.
subtasks.details: Implement a class named ToolRegistry that includes methods for registering and retrieving tool definitions and handlers.
subtasks.testStrategy: Develop unit tests to verify tool registration and retrieval functionality.

subtasks.title: Integrate ToolRegistry with AgentContext
subtasks.description: Ensure ToolRegistry can be accessed and used within AgentContext.
subtasks.details: Modify AgentContext to include a reference to ToolRegistry, allowing tools to be managed within the context.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test integration by registering a tool and retrieving it through AgentContext.

subtasks.title: Document AgentContext and ToolRegistry
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive documentation for both AgentContext and ToolRegistry.
subtasks.details: Write detailed documentation explaining the purpose, usage, and methods of AgentContext and ToolRegistry.

subtasks.title: Review and Refactor Code
subtasks.description: Conduct a code review and refactor for clarity and efficiency.
subtasks.details: Review the implemented code for AgentContext and ToolRegistry, refactor as needed for clarity and performance.
subtasks.testStrategy: Ensure all tests pass after refactoring and no functionality is broken.

tasks.title: Implement ConversationHistory
tasks.description: Create a ConversationHistory class to manage message history in PostgreSQL.
tasks.details: Create a PostgreSQL table 'conversation_messages' with columns for thread_id, messages (JSONB), and updated_at. Implement methods to load, save, and clear message history.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests with a real PostgreSQL database to verify message history is correctly saved, loaded, and cleared.

subtasks.title: Design PostgreSQL Table for Conversation History
subtasks.description: Design the 'conversation_messages' table schema in PostgreSQL.
subtasks.details: Define columns: thread_id (UUID), messages (JSONB), updated_at (timestamp).
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify table creation with correct schema.

subtasks.title: Implement Method to Save Message History
subtasks.description: Develop a method to save message history to the database.
subtasks.details: Create a method to insert or update records in 'conversation_messages'.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration test to ensure messages are saved correctly.

subtasks.title: Implement Method to Load Message History
subtasks.description: Develop a method to load message history from the database.
subtasks.details: Create a method to retrieve messages based on thread_id from 'conversation_messages'.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration test to verify correct message retrieval.

subtasks.title: Implement Method to Clear Message History
subtasks.description: Develop a method to clear message history from the database.
subtasks.details: Create a method to delete records from 'conversation_messages' based on thread_id.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration test to ensure messages are cleared correctly.

subtasks.title: Write Integration Tests for ConversationHistory
subtasks.description: Develop integration tests for all methods in ConversationHistory.
subtasks.details: Create tests to verify save, load, and clear operations with a real PostgreSQL database.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run tests to confirm all methods work as expected.

tasks.title: Develop OpenAI Function Calling Loop
tasks.description: Implement the main agent loop using OpenAI's function calling.
tasks.details: Create runner.py with an async function that processes messages using OpenAI's SDK. Implement message handling, tool call dispatching, and conversation history management.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests with mocked OpenAI client to verify message processing and tool call handling.

subtasks.title: Set Up Async Function in runner.py
subtasks.description: Create an async function in runner.py to handle message processing.
subtasks.details: Initialize runner.py and define an async function to process incoming messages using OpenAI's SDK.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test to verify async function setup.

subtasks.title: Implement Message Handling Logic
subtasks.description: Develop logic to handle incoming messages within the async function.
subtasks.details: Add code to parse and handle messages, ensuring correct format and error handling.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test with mocked messages to verify handling logic.

subtasks.title: Integrate Tool Call Dispatching
subtasks.description: Add functionality to dispatch tool calls from messages.
subtasks.details: Implement logic to identify and dispatch tool calls using OpenAI's function calling capabilities.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test with mocked tool calls to verify dispatching.

subtasks.title: Manage Conversation History
subtasks.description: Implement conversation history management within the async function.
subtasks.details: Integrate ConversationHistory class to load, save, and clear message history.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration test with ConversationHistory to verify history management.

subtasks.title: Finalize and Test Main Agent Loop
subtasks.description: Complete the main agent loop and conduct comprehensive testing.
subtasks.details: Ensure all components are integrated and functioning as expected. Conduct thorough testing of the entire loop.
subtasks.testStrategy: Comprehensive unit and integration tests to verify loop functionality.

tasks.title: Create Skill Protocol and Adapter
tasks.description: Define a Skill protocol and implement an adapter for OpenAI tool dicts.
tasks.details: Define a Skill protocol with tool_definition and handle methods. Implement an adapter to convert skills to OpenAI tool dicts using Pydantic models for parameters.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to ensure skills conform to the protocol and are correctly converted to tool dicts.

subtasks.title: Define Skill Protocol Interface
subtasks.description: Create the Skill protocol interface with required methods.
subtasks.details: Define the Skill protocol with 'tool_definition' and 'handle' methods using Python's ABC module.
subtasks.testStrategy: Write unit tests to ensure the interface methods are correctly defined.

subtasks.title: Implement Tool Definition Method
subtasks.description: Develop the 'tool_definition' method for the Skill protocol.
subtasks.details: Implement the 'tool_definition' method to specify the tool's metadata and required parameters.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test the method to ensure it returns correct tool metadata.

subtasks.title: Implement Handle Method
subtasks.description: Develop the 'handle' method for the Skill protocol.
subtasks.details: Implement the 'handle' method to process input data and return results.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test the method with various inputs to ensure correct processing.

subtasks.title: Create Adapter for OpenAI Tool Dicts
subtasks.description: Develop an adapter to convert skills to OpenAI tool dicts.
subtasks.details: Use Pydantic models to map Skill protocol methods to OpenAI tool dicts.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test the adapter to ensure it correctly converts skills to tool dicts.

subtasks.title: Write Unit Tests for Adapter
subtasks.description: Develop unit tests for the adapter implementation.
subtasks.details: Create unit tests to verify the adapter's functionality and ensure it handles edge cases.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run tests to confirm the adapter's accuracy and reliability.

tasks.title: Migrate Existing Skills
tasks.description: Convert all existing skills to the new OpenAI tool dict format.
tasks.details: Refactor each of the 9 existing skills to implement the Skill protocol and use the new adapter for tool dicts.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for each skill to verify correct behavior and integration with the new system.

subtasks.title: Analyze Existing Skills
subtasks.description: Review the current implementation of all 9 existing skills.
subtasks.details: Identify the structure and functionality of each skill to understand how they will map to the new format.

subtasks.title: Design Skill Protocol Interface
subtasks.description: Create a new interface for the Skill protocol.
subtasks.details: Define the methods and properties required for the Skill protocol to ensure compatibility with the new system.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to verify interface methods are correctly defined.

subtasks.title: Implement New Adapter for Tool Dicts
subtasks.description: Develop an adapter to convert skills to the new tool dict format.
subtasks.details: Create an adapter that translates existing skill data into the new tool dict format, ensuring compatibility with the Skill protocol.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to verify correct conversion of skills to tool dict format.

subtasks.title: Refactor Each Skill to Use New Protocol
subtasks.description: Update each of the 9 skills to implement the new Skill protocol and adapter.
subtasks.details: Refactor the code for each skill to use the new protocol and adapter, ensuring all functionalities are preserved.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for each skill to verify correct behavior and integration.

subtasks.title: Conduct Integration Testing
subtasks.description: Perform integration tests to ensure all skills work with the new system.
subtasks.details: Test the integration of all refactored skills within the system to ensure they interact correctly with other components.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests to verify system-wide compatibility and performance.

tasks.title: Refactor WorkerDispatcher for Concurrency
tasks.description: Update WorkerDispatcher to use asyncio.TaskGroup for concurrent processing.
tasks.details: Refactor WorkerDispatcher to use asyncio.TaskGroup and Semaphore for managing concurrent tasks. Implement graceful shutdown handling.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests to verify concurrent job processing and graceful shutdown behavior.

subtasks.title: Analyze Current WorkerDispatcher Implementation
subtasks.description: Review the existing WorkerDispatcher code to understand its structure and functionality.
subtasks.details: Examine how tasks are currently dispatched and managed. Identify areas that need refactoring for concurrency.

subtasks.title: Integrate asyncio.TaskGroup for Task Management
subtasks.description: Refactor WorkerDispatcher to use asyncio.TaskGroup for managing concurrent tasks.
subtasks.details: Replace existing task management logic with asyncio.TaskGroup to handle multiple tasks concurrently.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests to verify concurrent task execution.

subtasks.title: Implement Semaphore for Concurrency Control
subtasks.description: Use Semaphore to limit the number of concurrent tasks in WorkerDispatcher.
subtasks.details: Integrate asyncio.Semaphore to control the maximum number of concurrent tasks allowed.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests to ensure Semaphore limits are respected.

subtasks.title: Add Graceful Shutdown Handling
subtasks.description: Implement logic to handle graceful shutdown of WorkerDispatcher.
subtasks.details: Ensure that all running tasks are completed or properly terminated during shutdown.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests to verify graceful shutdown behavior.

subtasks.title: Conduct Integration Testing
subtasks.description: Perform integration tests to validate the refactored WorkerDispatcher.
subtasks.details: Test the entire WorkerDispatcher system to ensure concurrency and shutdown handling work as expected.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests focusing on concurrency and shutdown scenarios.

tasks.title: Implement Retry Logic and DLQ
tasks.description: Add retry logic with exponential backoff and a Dead-Letter Queue for failed jobs.
tasks.details: Implement retry logic with configurable max_retries and backoff strategy. Use Redis for DLQ to store failed jobs with error details.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests to verify retry behavior and DLQ population for failed jobs.

subtasks.title: Design Retry Logic with Exponential Backoff
subtasks.description: Design the retry logic with configurable max_retries and exponential backoff.
subtasks.details: Define the algorithm for exponential backoff and parameters for max_retries.
subtasks.testStrategy: Review design with team and unit test algorithm.

subtasks.title: Implement Retry Logic
subtasks.description: Develop the retry logic based on the design specifications.
subtasks.details: Code the retry mechanism using the designed algorithm and parameters.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to validate retry behavior.

subtasks.title: Integrate Redis for Dead-Letter Queue
subtasks.description: Set up Redis to store failed jobs with error details.
subtasks.details: Configure Redis and create a structure to store job details and errors.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests to verify data storage in Redis.

subtasks.title: Implement DLQ Population Logic
subtasks.description: Develop logic to populate the DLQ with failed jobs.
subtasks.details: Code the mechanism to move jobs to DLQ after max retries are exceeded.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests to ensure jobs are moved to DLQ correctly.

subtasks.title: Conduct Integration Testing
subtasks.description: Perform integration tests to verify retry logic and DLQ functionality.
subtasks.details: Test the complete flow from retry attempts to DLQ population.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run integration tests and validate results against expected outcomes.

tasks.title: Add Lead Locking Mechanism
tasks.description: Implement a Redis-based mutex to prevent concurrent processing of the same lead.
tasks.details: Use Redis to create a mutex lock for each lead based on account_id and phone. Implement retry logic for acquiring the lock.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests to ensure that only one job processes a lead at a time and that retries occur when locks are unavailable.

subtasks.title: Research Redis Mutex Implementation
subtasks.description: Investigate how to implement a mutex lock using Redis.
subtasks.details: Explore Redis commands and libraries that support mutex locks, focusing on account_id and phone as keys.

subtasks.title: Design Lead Locking Mechanism
subtasks.description: Create a design document for the lead locking mechanism.
subtasks.details: Outline the structure and flow of the mutex lock, including retry logic and error handling.

subtasks.title: Implement Redis Mutex Lock
subtasks.description: Develop the Redis-based mutex lock for leads.
subtasks.details: Write code to create a mutex lock using Redis, ensuring it locks based on account_id and phone.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to verify lock creation and release.

subtasks.title: Implement Retry Logic for Lock Acquisition
subtasks.description: Add retry logic for acquiring the mutex lock.
subtasks.details: Implement retry logic with exponential backoff for acquiring the lock when it's unavailable.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests to ensure retries occur correctly.

subtasks.title: Conduct Integration Testing
subtasks.description: Perform integration testing for the lead locking mechanism.
subtasks.details: Test the complete locking mechanism to ensure only one job processes a lead at a time.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests to verify that the lock prevents concurrent processing.

tasks.title: Setup Hetzner Infrastructure
tasks.description: Provision Hetzner VMs with private networking and firewall configurations.
tasks.details: Create a private network for app and db servers. Configure firewalls to restrict access to necessary ports only.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual testing to verify network connectivity and firewall rules.

subtasks.title: Create Private Network for VMs
subtasks.description: Set up a private network for application and database servers on Hetzner.
subtasks.details: Use Hetzner's networking tools to create a private network that connects the app and db servers securely.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify network isolation and connectivity between VMs.

subtasks.title: Provision Application Server VM
subtasks.description: Create and configure the virtual machine for the application server.
subtasks.details: Use Hetzner Cloud Console to provision a VM with necessary resources for the application server.
subtasks.testStrategy: Ensure VM is accessible via the private network.

subtasks.title: Provision Database Server VM
subtasks.description: Create and configure the virtual machine for the database server.
subtasks.details: Use Hetzner Cloud Console to provision a VM with necessary resources for the database server.
subtasks.testStrategy: Ensure VM is accessible via the private network.

subtasks.title: Configure Firewall Rules
subtasks.description: Set up firewall rules to restrict access to necessary ports only.
subtasks.details: Configure Hetzner firewall to allow only essential traffic to and from the VMs, blocking all other ports.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test firewall rules by attempting connections on allowed and blocked ports.

subtasks.title: Verify Network and Firewall Setup
subtasks.description: Conduct manual testing to verify network connectivity and firewall configurations.
subtasks.details: Perform tests to ensure that the private network is functioning correctly and that firewall rules are properly restricting access.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual testing to verify network connectivity and firewall rules.

tasks.title: Install and Configure PostgreSQL
tasks.description: Set up PostgreSQL on the db-server with secure access and automated backups.
tasks.details: Install PostgreSQL, configure access from the app-server, and set up daily backups with a 14-day retention policy.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual verification of database connectivity and successful backup and restore operations.

subtasks.title: Install PostgreSQL on db-server
subtasks.description: Install the latest version of PostgreSQL on the db-server.
subtasks.details: Use the package manager to install PostgreSQL. Ensure the service is running after installation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify PostgreSQL service is active.

subtasks.title: Configure secure access for PostgreSQL
subtasks.description: Set up secure access for PostgreSQL from the app-server.
subtasks.details: Edit the pg_hba.conf and postgresql.conf files to allow connections from the app-server IP. Use SSL for secure connections.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test connection from app-server using SSL.

subtasks.title: Create PostgreSQL user and database
subtasks.description: Create a new PostgreSQL user and database for the application.
subtasks.details: Use psql to create a user with a strong password and a database owned by this user.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify user can connect and access the database.

subtasks.title: Set up automated daily backups
subtasks.description: Configure daily backups for PostgreSQL with a 14-day retention policy.
subtasks.details: Use pg_dump to create a backup script. Schedule it with cron to run daily, and configure retention using a cleanup script.
subtasks.testStrategy: Check backup files are created and old files are deleted after 14 days.

subtasks.title: Test backup and restore process
subtasks.description: Ensure the backup and restore process works correctly.
subtasks.details: Perform a test backup and restore operation to verify data integrity and process reliability.
subtasks.testStrategy: Restore from backup and verify data consistency.

tasks.title: Deploy Application with Docker Compose
tasks.description: Deploy the backend and frontend applications using Docker Compose on the app-server.
tasks.details: Create Docker Compose configurations for the API, worker, and web services. Ensure services restart automatically and are health-checked.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual testing to verify application deployment and service health checks.

subtasks.title: Create Docker Compose File for API Service
subtasks.description: Develop a Docker Compose configuration for the API service.
subtasks.details: Define the API service in the Docker Compose file with necessary environment variables and ports.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify API service starts and responds to requests.

subtasks.title: Configure Docker Compose for Worker Service
subtasks.description: Set up Docker Compose for the worker service.
subtasks.details: Add the worker service to the Docker Compose file, ensuring it has the correct dependencies and restart policy.
subtasks.testStrategy: Check worker service logs for correct task processing.

subtasks.title: Set Up Docker Compose for Web Service
subtasks.description: Implement Docker Compose configuration for the web service.
subtasks.details: Include the web service in the Docker Compose file, mapping necessary ports and setting environment variables.
subtasks.testStrategy: Access the web service via browser to ensure it loads correctly.

subtasks.title: Implement Health Checks for All Services
subtasks.description: Add health checks to Docker Compose for API, worker, and web services.
subtasks.details: Define health check parameters for each service in the Docker Compose file to ensure they are running properly.
subtasks.testStrategy: Simulate failures and verify services restart automatically.

subtasks.title: Test and Validate Docker Compose Deployment
subtasks.description: Conduct manual testing to ensure all services deploy correctly with Docker Compose.
subtasks.details: Deploy the application using Docker Compose and verify all services are operational and healthy.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manually test each service endpoint and monitor logs for errors.

tasks.title: Implement Cloudflare Tunnel
tasks.description: Set up Cloudflare Tunnel to expose the application securely without public IPs.
tasks.details: Install and configure Cloudflare Tunnel on the app-server to route traffic to the API and web services securely.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual testing to verify tunnel configuration and secure access to services.

subtasks.title: Install Cloudflare Tunnel on App Server
subtasks.description: Install the Cloudflare Tunnel software on the application server.
subtasks.details: Download and install the Cloudflare Tunnel package on the app server following the official documentation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify installation by checking the version.

subtasks.title: Configure Cloudflare Tunnel for API Service
subtasks.description: Set up Cloudflare Tunnel to route traffic to the API service.
subtasks.details: Create a configuration file for the API service, specifying the local service address and desired subdomain.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test API access via the tunnel using curl.

subtasks.title: Configure Cloudflare Tunnel for Web Service
subtasks.description: Set up Cloudflare Tunnel to route traffic to the web service.
subtasks.details: Create a configuration file for the web service, specifying the local service address and desired subdomain.
subtasks.testStrategy: Access the web service through the tunnel from a browser.

subtasks.title: Verify Tunnel Security Settings
subtasks.description: Ensure the Cloudflare Tunnel is configured with secure settings.
subtasks.details: Check the configuration for TLS settings and access restrictions to ensure secure connections.
subtasks.testStrategy: Attempt unauthorized access to verify security.

subtasks.title: Document Cloudflare Tunnel Setup
subtasks.description: Document the setup process and configurations for future reference.
subtasks.details: Create a detailed document outlining the installation, configuration, and testing steps for the Cloudflare Tunnel.

tasks.title: Setup CI Pipeline with GitHub Actions
tasks.description: Create a CI pipeline for linting, testing, and type-checking using GitHub Actions.
tasks.details: Configure GitHub Actions to run lint, test, and type-check jobs on pull requests and pushes to main.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify CI pipeline execution on test pull requests and ensure all checks pass.

subtasks.title: Create GitHub Actions Workflow File
subtasks.description: Create the initial workflow file for the CI pipeline.
subtasks.details: Create a new YAML file in the .github/workflows directory to define the CI pipeline.
subtasks.testStrategy: Check if the workflow file is correctly recognized by GitHub.

subtasks.title: Configure Linting Job
subtasks.description: Set up a job in the workflow to run linting checks.
subtasks.details: Add a job to the workflow file that runs linting using the appropriate linter for the codebase.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that the linting job runs successfully on a test pull request.

subtasks.title: Configure Testing Job
subtasks.description: Set up a job in the workflow to run unit tests.
subtasks.details: Add a job to the workflow file that runs unit tests using the project's test framework.
subtasks.testStrategy: Ensure all tests pass when the job is executed on a test pull request.

subtasks.title: Configure Type-Checking Job
subtasks.description: Set up a job in the workflow to perform type-checking.
subtasks.details: Add a job to the workflow file that performs type-checking using a tool like mypy.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that the type-checking job runs without errors on a test pull request.

subtasks.title: Test CI Pipeline on Pull Requests and Pushes
subtasks.description: Test the entire CI pipeline on pull requests and pushes to main.
subtasks.details: Create test pull requests and pushes to ensure the CI pipeline triggers and runs all jobs correctly.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that all jobs in the CI pipeline execute successfully and report results on GitHub.

tasks.title: Setup CD Pipeline with GitHub Actions
tasks.description: Implement a CD pipeline for automated deployment on successful merges to main.
tasks.details: Configure GitHub Actions to build Docker images, push to GHCR, and deploy to the app-server via SSH.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify CD pipeline execution on test merges and ensure successful deployment.

subtasks.title: Create GitHub Actions Workflow File
subtasks.description: Create a new workflow file for the CD pipeline in the GitHub repository.
subtasks.details: Add a YAML file in the .github/workflows directory to define the CD pipeline.
subtasks.testStrategy: Check if the workflow file is correctly recognized by GitHub.

subtasks.title: Configure Docker Build and Push
subtasks.description: Set up the workflow to build Docker images and push them to GitHub Container Registry (GHCR).
subtasks.details: Use GitHub Actions to build Docker images and push them to GHCR on successful merges to main.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify Docker images are correctly built and pushed to GHCR.

subtasks.title: Setup SSH Deployment to App Server
subtasks.description: Configure the workflow to deploy the application to the app server via SSH.
subtasks.details: Use SSH keys to securely connect and deploy the application to the app server.
subtasks.testStrategy: Ensure the application is correctly deployed to the server.

subtasks.title: Implement Environment Variables Management
subtasks.description: Manage environment variables securely within the GitHub Actions workflow.
subtasks.details: Use GitHub Secrets to store and access necessary environment variables for deployment.
subtasks.testStrategy: Check if environment variables are correctly accessed during the workflow execution.

subtasks.title: Test and Validate CD Pipeline
subtasks.description: Perform test merges to validate the entire CD pipeline from build to deployment.
subtasks.details: Conduct test merges to ensure the pipeline executes successfully and the application is deployed without errors.
subtasks.testStrategy: Perform end-to-end testing of the CD pipeline with test merges.

tasks.title: Implement Branch Protection Rules
tasks.description: Configure GitHub branch protection rules to enforce CI checks and review requirements.
tasks.details: Set branch protection rules on main to require passing CI checks and at least one approval for merges.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual verification of branch protection settings and enforcement on test pull requests.

subtasks.title: Review Current Branch Settings
subtasks.description: Examine the current branch settings on GitHub for the main branch.
subtasks.details: Access the GitHub repository settings and document existing branch protection rules.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual verification of current settings.

subtasks.title: Define CI Check Requirements
subtasks.description: Specify which CI checks must pass before a merge is allowed.
subtasks.details: Identify necessary CI checks and document them for inclusion in branch protection rules.
subtasks.testStrategy: Ensure CI checks are correctly identified and documented.

subtasks.title: Configure Approval Requirement
subtasks.description: Set up the requirement for at least one approval before merging.
subtasks.details: Modify branch protection rules to require at least one code review approval for merges.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test by creating a pull request and verifying approval requirement.

subtasks.title: Implement Branch Protection Rules
subtasks.description: Apply the defined branch protection rules on the main branch.
subtasks.details: Use GitHub settings to enforce CI checks and approval requirements on the main branch.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual verification by attempting to merge a pull request without meeting requirements.

subtasks.title: Test Branch Protection Enforcement
subtasks.description: Verify that the branch protection rules are enforced correctly.
subtasks.details: Create test pull requests to ensure that CI checks and approval requirements are enforced.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual testing with test pull requests to confirm enforcement.

tasks.title: Remove LangChain and LangGraph Dependencies

subtasks.details: Remove import statements and ensure no compilation errors occur.

subtasks.title: Replace LangChain Functionality with OpenAI SDK
subtasks.description: Substitute LangChain functionality with equivalent OpenAI SDK functions.

subtasks.title: Replace LangGraph Functionality with OpenAI SDK
subtasks.description: Substitute LangGraph functionality with equivalent OpenAI SDK functions.

subtasks.title: Conduct Comprehensive Testing

subtasks.testStrategy: Ensure all tests pass and no references to LangChain or LangGraph remain.

tasks.title: Optimize Dockerfiles for Production
tasks.description: Create optimized multi-stage Dockerfiles for the API and web applications.
tasks.details: Implement multi-stage builds to reduce image size and improve build efficiency. Ensure non-root user execution.
tasks.testStrategy: Build and run Docker images locally to verify size and functionality.

subtasks.title: Analyze Current Dockerfiles
subtasks.description: Review existing Dockerfiles for the API and web applications.
subtasks.details: Examine the current Dockerfiles to identify areas for optimization, focusing on image size and build efficiency.
subtasks.testStrategy: Document findings and potential improvements.

subtasks.title: Implement Multi-Stage Builds
subtasks.description: Create multi-stage Dockerfiles for the API and web applications.
subtasks.details: Refactor Dockerfiles to use multi-stage builds, separating build and runtime stages to reduce image size.
subtasks.testStrategy: Build Docker images locally and verify reduced size.

subtasks.title: Ensure Non-Root User Execution
subtasks.description: Modify Dockerfiles to ensure applications run as non-root users.

subtasks.title: Optimize Build Efficiency
subtasks.description: Improve the efficiency of the Docker build process.
subtasks.details: Reorder Dockerfile instructions to leverage caching and minimize build times.
subtasks.testStrategy: Measure build times before and after optimization.

subtasks.title: Test and Validate Optimized Dockerfiles
subtasks.description: Test the optimized Dockerfiles for functionality and performance.
subtasks.details: Build and run the Docker images locally, ensuring all functionalities work as expected and performance is improved.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify image size, build time, and application functionality in local environment.

tasks.title: Implement Professional Prompt System
tasks.description: Refactor the prompt system to separate system prompts, context, and skill instructions.
tasks.details: Create a prompt builder that assembles prompts from distinct sections for identity, capabilities, context, and rules.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to verify prompt assembly and correctness.

subtasks.title: Design Prompt System Architecture
subtasks.description: Outline the architecture for the new prompt system.
subtasks.details: Create a detailed design document outlining how the prompt system will separate system prompts, context, and skill instructions.

subtasks.title: Develop Identity Section Module
subtasks.description: Implement the module for handling identity prompts.
subtasks.details: Create a module that manages identity-related prompts, ensuring they can be easily integrated into the prompt builder.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to verify identity prompt integration.

subtasks.title: Develop Capabilities Section Module
subtasks.description: Implement the module for handling capabilities prompts.
subtasks.details: Create a module that manages capabilities-related prompts, ensuring they can be easily integrated into the prompt builder.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to verify capabilities prompt integration.

subtasks.title: Develop Context Section Module
subtasks.description: Implement the module for handling context prompts.
subtasks.details: Create a module that manages context-related prompts, ensuring they can be easily integrated into the prompt builder.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to verify context prompt integration.

subtasks.title: Implement Prompt Builder
subtasks.description: Create the main prompt builder to assemble prompts from all sections.
subtasks.details: Develop the prompt builder that assembles prompts from identity, capabilities, context, and rules sections.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to verify prompt assembly and correctness.

tasks.title: Refactor Guards as Middleware
tasks.description: Convert guards to middleware executed before the agent loop.
tasks.details: Implement guards as async functions that check messages and context before processing. Migrate existing guards to this new system.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to verify guard execution and blocking behavior.

subtasks.title: Analyze Current Guard Implementation
subtasks.description: Review existing guard implementations to understand their functionality.
subtasks.details: Examine the current guard functions to identify their roles and how they interact with the system.

subtasks.title: Design Middleware Structure
subtasks.description: Create a design for the middleware structure to replace guards.
subtasks.details: Outline how the middleware will be structured, including entry points and execution flow.

subtasks.title: Implement Middleware Base Class
subtasks.description: Develop a base class for middleware to standardize execution.
subtasks.details: Create an abstract base class that defines the interface and common functionality for all middleware.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to verify base class functionality.

subtasks.title: Migrate Existing Guards to Middleware
subtasks.description: Convert existing guard functions into middleware components.
subtasks.details: Refactor each guard function to conform to the new middleware structure, ensuring compatibility with the agent loop.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to ensure each middleware component functions as expected.

subtasks.title: Integrate Middleware into Agent Loop
subtasks.description: Incorporate the new middleware into the agent loop for execution.
subtasks.details: Modify the agent loop to execute middleware before processing messages, ensuring correct order and error handling.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests to verify middleware execution within the agent loop.

tasks.title: Implement Streaming Response Mode
tasks.description: Add support for streaming responses from the agent to reduce perceived latency.
tasks.details: Modify the runner to support streaming responses using OpenAI's streaming API. Implement callbacks for text chunks.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests to verify streaming behavior and response assembly.

subtasks.title: Research OpenAI Streaming API
subtasks.description: Investigate the OpenAI streaming API to understand its capabilities and requirements.
subtasks.details: Review OpenAI documentation and examples for streaming API usage.

subtasks.title: Modify Runner for Streaming
subtasks.description: Update the runner to handle streaming responses from the API.
subtasks.details: Refactor the runner to initiate and manage streaming connections.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to verify runner modifications.

subtasks.title: Implement Callbacks for Text Chunks
subtasks.description: Create callbacks to process and display text chunks as they arrive.
subtasks.details: Develop callback functions to handle incoming text chunks and update the UI.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to ensure callbacks process text correctly.

subtasks.title: Integrate Streaming with Existing System
subtasks.description: Connect the streaming functionality with the current system architecture.
subtasks.details: Ensure seamless integration of streaming responses with existing components.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests to verify system-wide streaming behavior.

subtasks.title: Conduct Integration Testing
subtasks.description: Perform integration tests to ensure streaming responses work as expected.
subtasks.details: Test the complete streaming response flow in a staging environment.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests to verify streaming behavior and response assembly.

tasks.title: Add Observability Metrics
tasks.description: Instrument the agent with metrics for latency, tool usage, and worker throughput.
tasks.details: Use prometheus_client to add metrics for agent run duration, tool calls, and worker job counts. Expose metrics via a /metrics endpoint.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests to verify metric collection and exposure.

subtasks.title: Set Up Prometheus Client Library
subtasks.description: Install and configure the prometheus_client library for metrics collection.
subtasks.details: Add prometheus_client to the project dependencies and configure it for use in the agent.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify installation and basic configuration.

subtasks.title: Instrument Agent Run Duration
subtasks.description: Add metrics to measure the duration of agent runs.
subtasks.details: Use prometheus_client to create a histogram metric for tracking agent run duration.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run the agent and check if the run duration metrics are collected.

subtasks.title: Track Tool Usage Metrics
subtasks.description: Add metrics to track the usage of different tools by the agent.
subtasks.details: Implement a counter metric for each tool call using prometheus_client.
subtasks.testStrategy: Invoke tool calls and verify metrics are incremented correctly.

subtasks.title: Measure Worker Throughput
subtasks.description: Add metrics to measure the throughput of worker jobs.
subtasks.details: Create a gauge metric to track the number of jobs processed by workers.
subtasks.testStrategy: Simulate worker jobs and ensure throughput metrics are updated.

subtasks.title: Expose Metrics via /metrics Endpoint
subtasks.description: Create an HTTP endpoint to expose the collected metrics.
subtasks.details: Set up an HTTP server to serve metrics at the /metrics endpoint using prometheus_client.
subtasks.testStrategy: Access the /metrics endpoint and verify all metrics are exposed correctly.

tasks.title: Conduct Load Testing
tasks.description: Perform load testing to ensure the system can handle 50 simultaneous messages without degradation.
tasks.details: Use a load testing tool to simulate 50 concurrent messages and measure system performance and response times.
tasks.testStrategy: Analyze load test results to ensure performance targets are met.

subtasks.title: Select Load Testing Tool
subtasks.description: Choose an appropriate load testing tool for simulating 50 concurrent messages.
subtasks.details: Evaluate tools like JMeter, LoadRunner, or Locust for compatibility and ease of use.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify tool setup with a basic test.

subtasks.title: Configure Load Test Environment
subtasks.description: Set up the environment for load testing, including necessary configurations.
subtasks.details: Prepare the test environment with necessary hardware and software configurations to support load testing.
subtasks.testStrategy: Ensure environment stability under test conditions.

subtasks.title: Develop Load Test Scripts
subtasks.description: Create scripts to simulate 50 concurrent messages using the selected tool.
subtasks.details: Write scripts that accurately simulate the load scenario, ensuring they reflect real-world usage.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run scripts in a controlled environment to validate accuracy.

subtasks.title: Execute Load Test
subtasks.description: Run the load test to measure system performance and response times.
subtasks.details: Execute the load test and monitor system performance metrics such as response time, throughput, and error rates.
subtasks.testStrategy: Collect and analyze performance data to ensure targets are met.

subtasks.title: Analyze and Report Results
subtasks.description: Analyze the results of the load test and document findings.
subtasks.details: Review the collected data to identify any performance bottlenecks or degradation issues and compile a detailed report.
subtasks.testStrategy: Ensure report accuracy and completeness with peer review.

tasks.title: Finalize Documentation
tasks.description: Update and finalize all documentation related to the new system architecture and processes.
tasks.details: Revise existing documentation to reflect changes in architecture, deployment, and operational procedures. Ensure clarity and completeness.
tasks.testStrategy: Peer review of documentation to ensure accuracy and usability.

subtasks.title: Review Existing Documentation
subtasks.description: Review current documentation to identify outdated sections.
subtasks.details: Go through all existing documents related to the system architecture and processes to identify areas that need updates.
subtasks.testStrategy: Peer review to ensure all outdated sections are identified.

subtasks.title: Update Architecture Documentation
subtasks.description: Revise documentation to reflect new system architecture changes.
subtasks.details: Update diagrams and descriptions to match the new architecture. Ensure all components are accurately represented.
subtasks.testStrategy: Cross-check with architecture team for accuracy.

subtasks.title: Revise Deployment Procedures
subtasks.description: Update deployment documentation to align with new processes.
subtasks.details: Modify deployment guides to include new steps and tools used in the updated process.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test deployment using the updated guide to ensure completeness.

subtasks.title: Update Operational Procedures
subtasks.description: Revise operational documentation to reflect new procedures.
subtasks.details: Ensure all operational steps are updated to match the new system processes, including troubleshooting and maintenance.
subtasks.testStrategy: Operational team to validate the updated procedures.

subtasks.title: Conduct Final Review and Approval
subtasks.description: Perform a final review of all updated documentation and obtain necessary approvals.
subtasks.details: Compile all updated documents and conduct a peer review session. Obtain approval from relevant stakeholders.
subtasks.testStrategy: Approval from stakeholders and final peer review feedback.

tasks.title: Implement Admin DLQ Inspection Endpoint
tasks.description: Create an admin endpoint to inspect the Dead-Letter Queue for failed jobs.
tasks.details: Develop a paginated admin endpoint to list entries in the DLQ, including job details and error information.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests to verify endpoint functionality and security.

subtasks.title: Design DLQ Inspection Endpoint
subtasks.description: Design the structure and requirements for the DLQ inspection endpoint.
subtasks.details: Create a detailed design document outlining the endpoint's URL, request parameters, response format, and pagination strategy.

subtasks.title: Implement DLQ Data Retrieval Logic
subtasks.description: Develop the logic to retrieve data from the Dead-Letter Queue.
subtasks.details: Write a function to query the DLQ, fetching job details and error information. Ensure data is structured for pagination.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to verify data retrieval accuracy.

subtasks.title: Develop Paginated Endpoint
subtasks.description: Create the paginated admin endpoint to serve DLQ data.
subtasks.details: Implement the endpoint using the designed URL and parameters. Integrate pagination logic to handle large datasets efficiently.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests to verify pagination and data integrity.

subtasks.title: Integrate Security Measures
subtasks.description: Add authentication and authorization to the DLQ endpoint.
subtasks.details: Ensure the endpoint is accessible only to authorized admin users. Implement token-based authentication and role checks.
subtasks.testStrategy: Security tests to verify access control and authentication.

subtasks.title: Conduct Endpoint Testing
subtasks.description: Perform comprehensive testing of the DLQ inspection endpoint.
subtasks.details: Execute integration tests to ensure endpoint functionality, security, and performance. Validate against test cases for various scenarios.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests focusing on endpoint functionality and security aspects.

tasks.title: Ensure Zero-Downtime Deployments
tasks.description: Configure deployments to ensure zero downtime using Docker health checks and rolling updates.
tasks.details: Implement health checks in Docker Compose and configure rolling updates to prevent downtime during deployments.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual testing to verify zero-downtime behavior during deployments.

subtasks.title: Research Docker Health Checks
subtasks.description: Investigate how to implement health checks in Docker Compose.
subtasks.details: Review Docker documentation and examples on health checks to understand implementation.

subtasks.title: Implement Docker Health Checks
subtasks.description: Add health checks to Docker Compose files for all services.
subtasks.details: Modify Docker Compose files to include health checks for each service, ensuring they reflect service-specific requirements.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify health checks are correctly configured by observing service status changes.

subtasks.title: Research Rolling Updates in Docker
subtasks.description: Understand how to configure rolling updates in Docker Compose.
subtasks.details: Study Docker Compose documentation and best practices for setting up rolling updates.

subtasks.title: Configure Rolling Updates
subtasks.description: Set up rolling updates in Docker Compose to ensure zero downtime.
subtasks.details: Update Docker Compose configurations to include rolling update strategies, ensuring minimal service disruption.
subtasks.testStrategy: Deploy updates in a test environment to confirm zero-downtime behavior.

subtasks.title: Test Zero-Downtime Deployment
subtasks.description: Conduct manual testing to verify zero-downtime during deployments.
subtasks.details: Deploy updates in a controlled environment and monitor service availability to ensure no downtime occurs.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual testing to observe service continuity during deployments.

tasks.title: Conduct Security Audit
tasks.description: Perform a security audit to ensure the system meets all security requirements and best practices.
tasks.details: Review system architecture, code, and configurations to identify and mitigate security risks.
tasks.testStrategy: Security audit report with identified issues and mitigation strategies.

subtasks.title: Review System Architecture
subtasks.description: Analyze the current system architecture for security vulnerabilities.
subtasks.details: Examine architectural diagrams and documentation to identify potential security weaknesses.
subtasks.testStrategy: Document identified vulnerabilities and propose mitigations.

subtasks.title: Conduct Code Review
subtasks.description: Perform a detailed code review to identify security issues.
subtasks.details: Review the codebase for common security flaws such as SQL injection, XSS, and insecure data handling.
subtasks.testStrategy: Compile a list of code vulnerabilities and recommended fixes.

subtasks.title: Evaluate Configuration Settings
subtasks.description: Assess system configurations for security compliance.
subtasks.details: Check server and application configurations against security best practices and compliance requirements.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create a report on configuration issues and suggest improvements.

subtasks.title: Perform Penetration Testing
subtasks.description: Execute penetration tests to simulate attacks on the system.
subtasks.details: Use automated tools and manual techniques to test the system's defenses against various attack vectors.
subtasks.testStrategy: Generate a penetration test report with findings and remediation steps.

subtasks.title: Compile Security Audit Report
subtasks.description: Document all findings and recommendations from the security audit.
subtasks.details: Consolidate all identified issues, vulnerabilities, and proposed mitigation strategies into a comprehensive report.
subtasks.testStrategy: Review the report for completeness and accuracy before submission.

tasks.title: Launch Production Environment
tasks.description: Deploy the final version of the application to the production environment.
tasks.details: Ensure all components are deployed and configured correctly in the production environment. Monitor initial performance and stability.
tasks.testStrategy: Monitor production environment for stability and performance issues post-launch.

subtasks.title: Prepare Production Environment
subtasks.description: Set up the production environment infrastructure.
subtasks.details: Ensure all servers and network configurations are ready for deployment.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify infrastructure readiness with test scripts.

subtasks.title: Deploy Application Components
subtasks.description: Deploy all application components to the production environment.
subtasks.details: Use Docker Compose to deploy API, worker, and web services.
subtasks.testStrategy: Monitor deployment logs for errors.

subtasks.title: Configure Monitoring and Alerts
subtasks.description: Set up monitoring and alerting for the production environment.
subtasks.details: Implement monitoring tools to track performance and stability.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test alerts by simulating performance issues.

subtasks.title: Conduct Security Audit
subtasks.description: Perform a security audit on the production environment.
subtasks.details: Review security configurations and perform penetration testing.
subtasks.testStrategy: Use automated security tools to identify vulnerabilities.

subtasks.title: Monitor Initial Performance and Stability
subtasks.description: Monitor the application post-deployment for performance and stability.
subtasks.details: Track key performance metrics and resolve any issues.
subtasks.testStrategy: Analyze performance data and adjust configurations as needed.

tasks.title: User Validation Checkpoint 1
tasks.description: Manually test functionality from Tasks 1-5: AgentContext, ConversationHistory, OpenAI runner, Skill Protocol, Skills migrated. Verify runner returns text, tool calls dispatch correctly, history persists in PostgreSQL.

subtasks.title: Test AgentContext Functionality
subtasks.description: Manually test the AgentContext functionality to ensure it operates as expected.
subtasks.details: Verify that the AgentContext initializes correctly and maintains state throughout interactions.
subtasks.testStrategy: Perform manual tests to ensure AgentContext maintains state.

subtasks.title: Verify ConversationHistory Persistence
subtasks.description: Ensure ConversationHistory is correctly stored and retrieved from PostgreSQL.
subtasks.details: Check that all conversation data is accurately saved and can be retrieved without data loss.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manually insert and retrieve conversation data to verify persistence.

subtasks.title: Test OpenAI Runner Output
subtasks.description: Verify that the OpenAI runner returns the expected text output.
subtasks.details: Run the OpenAI runner with various inputs and confirm the output matches expected results.
subtasks.testStrategy: Use predefined inputs to test runner output consistency.

subtasks.title: Validate Skill Protocol Dispatch
subtasks.description: Ensure tool calls are dispatched correctly using the Skill Protocol.
subtasks.details: Test various tool calls to confirm they are dispatched and executed as intended.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manually trigger tool calls and verify correct dispatch.

subtasks.title: Check Skills Migration
subtasks.description: Verify that all skills have been migrated and function correctly.
subtasks.details: Review the migration process and test each skill to ensure they operate as expected.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test each migrated skill to confirm functionality and integration.

tasks.title: User Validation Checkpoint 2
tasks.description: Manually test Tasks 6-10: concurrent WorkerDispatcher, retry+DLQ, lead lock, Hetzner infra, PostgreSQL. Verify 20 simultaneous messages process without blocking, failed jobs appear in DLQ.

subtasks.title: Test Concurrent WorkerDispatcher
subtasks.description: Manually test the concurrent WorkerDispatcher functionality.
subtasks.details: Ensure the WorkerDispatcher can handle 20 simultaneous messages without blocking.
subtasks.testStrategy: Simulate 20 concurrent message dispatches and observe performance.

subtasks.title: Verify Retry and DLQ Mechanism
subtasks.description: Check the retry logic and Dead Letter Queue (DLQ) functionality.
subtasks.details: Ensure failed jobs are retried correctly and appear in the DLQ if they fail.
subtasks.testStrategy: Force job failures and verify they are retried and logged in the DLQ.

subtasks.title: Test Lead Lock Mechanism
subtasks.description: Validate the lead lock mechanism for task processing.
subtasks.details: Ensure that the lead lock prevents multiple processes from handling the same task simultaneously.
subtasks.testStrategy: Attempt simultaneous task processing and check for lock enforcement.

subtasks.title: Validate Hetzner Infrastructure Setup
subtasks.description: Ensure Hetzner infrastructure is correctly configured for task processing.
subtasks.details: Check network configurations and resource allocations on Hetzner.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run infrastructure tests to verify setup and connectivity.

subtasks.title: Test PostgreSQL Integration
subtasks.description: Verify PostgreSQL database integration for task logging and data persistence.
subtasks.details: Ensure that task data is correctly logged and persisted in PostgreSQL.
subtasks.testStrategy: Perform database operations and check for correct data storage and retrieval.

tasks.title: User Validation Checkpoint 3
tasks.description: Manually test Tasks 11-15: Docker Compose deploy, Cloudflare Tunnel, CI pipeline, CD pipeline, branch protection. Verify curl https://api-iag2.ianexo.com.br/health returns 200, PR triggers CI.

subtasks.title: Test Docker Compose Deployment
subtasks.description: Manually test the Docker Compose deployment as per Task 11.
subtasks.details: Ensure the Docker Compose setup is correctly deploying the application. Follow the deployment steps outlined in Task 11 documentation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify deployment logs and application accessibility.

subtasks.title: Verify Cloudflare Tunnel Configuration
subtasks.description: Check the Cloudflare Tunnel setup as per Task 12.
subtasks.details: Ensure the Cloudflare Tunnel is correctly configured and operational. Follow the configuration guide from Task 12.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test tunnel connectivity and access logs.

subtasks.title: Test CI Pipeline Functionality
subtasks.description: Manually test the CI pipeline as per Task 13.
subtasks.details: Run the CI pipeline and ensure all stages complete successfully. Refer to Task 13 for pipeline stages and expected outcomes.
subtasks.testStrategy: Check CI logs and build artifacts.

subtasks.title: Test CD Pipeline Deployment
subtasks.description: Manually test the CD pipeline as per Task 14.
subtasks.details: Ensure the CD pipeline deploys the application without errors. Follow the deployment steps in Task 14.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify deployment success and application functionality post-deployment.

subtasks.title: Verify Branch Protection Rules
subtasks.description: Check branch protection rules as per Task 15.
subtasks.details: Ensure branch protection rules are correctly set up and enforced. Follow the guidelines from Task 15.
subtasks.testStrategy: Attempt to push changes to protected branches and verify restrictions.

tasks.title: User Validation Checkpoint 4
tasks.description: Manually test Tasks 16-20: LangChain removed, prompt_builder, guards middleware, streaming, metrics. Verify grep langchain returns 0 results, agent responds correctly end-to-end.

subtasks.title: Verify LangChain Removal
subtasks.description: Ensure LangChain is completely removed from the codebase.
subtasks.details: Run 'grep langchain' across the codebase to confirm no instances remain.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run 'grep langchain' and ensure it returns 0 results.

subtasks.title: Test Prompt Builder Functionality
subtasks.description: Manually test the prompt_builder feature for correct functionality.
subtasks.details: Create various prompts and ensure they are built correctly using the prompt_builder.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create test prompts and verify output matches expected format.

subtasks.title: Validate Guards Middleware
subtasks.description: Check that guards middleware is functioning as expected.
subtasks.details: Test middleware by simulating requests and ensuring correct guards are applied.
subtasks.testStrategy: Simulate requests and verify guards middleware blocks/permits as expected.

subtasks.title: Test Streaming Capabilities
subtasks.description: Ensure streaming functionality works end-to-end.
subtasks.details: Initiate streaming sessions and verify data is streamed correctly without interruptions.
subtasks.testStrategy: Conduct streaming tests and monitor for data integrity and continuity.

subtasks.title: Verify Metrics Collection
subtasks.description: Check that metrics are being collected and reported correctly.
subtasks.details: Review logs and dashboards to ensure metrics are accurately captured and reported.
subtasks.testStrategy: Compare collected metrics against expected values and verify dashboard displays.

tasks.title: User Validation Checkpoint 5 — Production Launch
tasks.description: Final validation: zero-downtime deploy, security audit, production launch. Verify uv run pytest green, mypy clean, CD deploys in <3min, uptime monitor active.

subtasks.title: Perform Zero-Downtime Deployment
subtasks.description: Execute a zero-downtime deployment to production.
subtasks.details: Use blue-green deployment strategy to ensure zero downtime. Monitor logs for any errors during the switch.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify no downtime by checking service availability during deployment.

subtasks.title: Conduct Security Audit
subtasks.description: Perform a comprehensive security audit before launch.
subtasks.details: Review code for vulnerabilities, check dependencies for known issues, and ensure all security patches are applied.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run automated security tests and manual code review.

subtasks.title: Verify Test Suite and Type Checks
subtasks.description: Ensure all tests pass and type checks are clean.
subtasks.details: Run 'uv run pytest' to ensure all tests pass and 'mypy' to check for type errors.
subtasks.testStrategy: Tests should pass without errors; mypy should report no issues.

subtasks.title: Optimize Continuous Deployment Pipeline
subtasks.description: Ensure CD pipeline deploys in under 3 minutes.
subtasks.details: Review and optimize pipeline steps to reduce deployment time. Consider parallelizing tasks where possible.
subtasks.testStrategy: Time the deployment process to ensure it completes within 3 minutes.

subtasks.title: Activate and Monitor Uptime Monitoring
subtasks.description: Ensure uptime monitoring is active and configured correctly.
subtasks.details: Set up monitoring tools to track service uptime and configure alerts for downtime.
subtasks.testStrategy: Simulate downtime and verify alerts are triggered correctly.
